backend/pom.xml.general_idea: Update Java version property from 17 to 21
backend/pom.xml.why_exists: Compilation fails if source/target/release settings do not match the target JDK 21 environment

backend/pom.xml.general_idea: Add lombok-mapstruct-binding dependency to resolve annotation processor conflicts
backend/pom.xml.why_exists: Runtime/Compile error: MapStruct and Lombok annotation processors conflict without the binding library, causing missing getters/setters in generated code

backend/pom.xml.general_idea: Remove deprecated source/target configuration from maven-compiler-plugin
backend/pom.xml.why_exists: Compilation warning/error: 'source' and 'target' are deprecated in favor of 'release' in newer Maven compiler plugin versions

backend/pom.xml.general_idea: Add lombok-mapstruct-binding to annotation processor paths
backend/pom.xml.why_exists: Compilation error: MapStruct and Lombok annotation processors conflict without the binding library in the processor path

backend/pom.xml.general_idea: Add release configuration to maven-compiler-plugin using java.version property
backend/pom.xml.why_exists: Compilation failure: Without 'release' set to 21, the compiler may not target JDK 21 correctly or may fail if source/target are removed
